issues.runtime_actual: Runtime uses a hardcoded 40% opacity on the default color.
issues.likely_cause: The disabled token was not mapped.
issues.required_fix: Update the shared button component to consume the disabled token, then recapture all disabled variants.
issues.suggested_traceback_action: Correct the disabled token mapping and revalidate every dependent button state.

notes: Do not patch this difference from a screen.
